## Compatibility and claim impact

- Compatibility classification: breaking|additive|corrective

## Checks

- [ ] `dart tool/check_spec.dart`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] GitHub Actions `Spec Check`
- [ ] `README.md` still describes the public spec root accurately.
- [ ] `LICENSE` remains present and applicable to this root.
- [ ] Adoption evidence impact checked; `README.md` updated or not affected.
- [ ] Matrix reference snapshot refreshed if external protocol context changed.

## Source-of-truth check

- [ ] This change updates canonical contracts or test vectors first.
- [ ] Clean-room confirmed: no implementation behavior was copied,
  translated, ported, or used as the source for public behavior.
